message:
fix: add concurrency protection to polecat Manager and dog Manager (gt-0wugq)

Polecat Manager: Add per-entity file locks (flock) for Add, Remove, and
RepairWorktree to prevent concurrent gt processes from racing through
filesystem operations. Add pool-level flock for AllocateName and
ReconcilePool to serialize cross-process name allocation.

Dog Manager: Add per-dog file locks for SetState, AssignWork, ClearWork,
Refresh, and RefreshRig to prevent load-modify-save races on state.json.
Switch saveState from os.WriteFile (which truncates before writing) to
util.AtomicWriteJSON (write-to-temp + rename) so concurrent loadState
never sees truncated/empty files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
